person.name: Richard Neville
person.alternateName: Sir Richard 5th Earl of Salisbury de Neville, KG (Neville)

memoryArtifacts.headline: Chart 4 in "The Genealogie or Pedegree of the Right Worshipfull and worthie Captaine Sir William Cole..."
Chart p5 in "The Genealogie or Pedegree of the Right Worshipfull and worthie Captaine Sir William Cole..."
Cenotaph effigy for Richard Neville (1400-1460), the 5th Earl of Salisbury, at Burghfield Parish Church.
memoryArtifacts.description:
This is a cenotaph effigy for Richard Neville (1400-1460), the 5th Earl of Salisbury, at Burghfield Parish Church. There is some disagreement as to whether or not the woman next to him is his wife Alice Montague or another related countess. A cenotaph is a tomblike monument to someone buried elsewhere, especially one commemorating people who died in a war. Note that the effigies have been defaced and were probably brought from the Abbey at Bisham where his burial is in Bisham Priory.

Source: http://www.findagrave.com/cgi-bin/fg.cgi?page=pv&GRid=62611066&PIpi=90079456

popularStory.headline: Richard Neville, 5th Earl of Salisbury
popularStory.description:
Lord Chamberlain of England
Supporter of Henry VI
Executed (beheaded) at Pontefract Castle on 12-31-1461, the day after the battle of Wakefield for siding with the Yorkists.
Head was fixed upon a gate …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Neville於1401年1月9日出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比 卡素時，他的父親Ralph Neville37歲，母親Joan de Beaufort25歲。他於1421年2月之前與Alice Montagu在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1438年登記服兵役。他於1454年在英國哈普爾被列為he held the office of keeper of porchester castle.。他去世於1460年12月31日在英國越可爾朋特福拉可特 卡素享年59歲，埋葬在英國波克夏波費爾德聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Neville于1401年1月9日出生在英国英格兰達勒姆拉比 卡素时，他的父亲Ralph Neville37岁，母亲Joan de Beaufort25岁。他于1421年2月之前与Alice Montagu在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1438年登记服兵役。他于1454年在英国哈普爾被列为he held the office of keeper of porchester castle.。他去世于1460年12月31日在英国越可爾朋特福拉可特 卡素享年59岁，埋葬在英国波克夏波費爾德聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Neville was born on 9 January 1401, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Neville, was 37 and his mother, Joan de Beaufort, was 25. He married Alice Montagu before February 1421, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He registered for military service in 1438. In 1454, at the age of 53, his occupation is listed as he held the office of keeper of porchester castle. in Hampshire, England. He died on 31 December 1460, in Pontefract Castle, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Burghfield, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Neville est né le 9 janvier 1401, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan de Beaufort, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice Montagu avant février 1421, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1438. En 1454, à l’âge de 53 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est he held the office of keeper of porchester castle. à Hampshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1460, à Pontefract Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Burghfield, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Neville am 9. Januar 1401 in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Neville 37 und seine Mutter Joan de Beaufort 25. Er hat vor Februar 1421 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England Alice Montagu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er hat sich 1438 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1454, als er 53 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als he held the office of keeper of porchester castle. in Hampshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 31. Dezember 1460 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Pontefract Castle, Yorkshire, England und wurde in St Mary's Church, Burghfield, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Neville è nato il il 9 gennaio 1401 nel Raby Castle, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Neville, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Beaufort, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice Montagu prima del febbraio 1421, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1438. Nel 1454, all'età di 53 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come he held the office of keeper of porchester castle. nel Hampshire, England. Morì il 31 dicembre 1460, nel Pontefract Castle, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Burghfield, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Nevilleが1401年1月9日にイギリスイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは37歳，母Joan de Beaufortは25歳であった。1421年2月以前にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでAlice Montaguと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1438年に兵役登録をした。1454年，53歳の時，イギリスハンプシュアイアでの職業はhe held the office of keeper of porchester castle.と記録されている。彼は1460年12月31日にイギリスヨークシュアイアポンテフラクト カストルで59歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアブルグhフィールドスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Neville(이)가 1401년 1월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Beaufort(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1421년 2월 이전 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Alice Montagu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1454년, 53세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 함프실르에서 he held the office of keeper of porchester castle.이었다. 그는 1460년 12월 31일 영국 요르크실르 폰테프라크트 카스틀에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 버그h필드 스트 마이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Neville nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1401, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Neville, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Beaufort, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Montagu antes fevereiro de 1421, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1438. Em 1454, com 53 anos, sua profissão aparece como he held the office of keeper of porchester castle. em Hampshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1460, em Pontefract Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Church, Burghfield, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Neville родился 9 января 1401 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Beaufort, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Montagu перед февраль 1421 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. В 1438 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1454 году, в возрасте 53 лет, работал по профессии he held the office of keeper of porchester castle. в местности хампшир, Англия. Он умер 31 декабря 1460 г. в местности понтефракт кастл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, бургфиелд, биркшир, Англия.
